active_ingredients: Active ingredients (in each caplet) Acetaminophen 500 mg Caffeine 65 mg
indications_and_usage: Uses Temporarily relieves minor aches and pains due to: headache muscular aches
dosage_and_administration: Directions do not use more than directed adults and children 12 years and over: take 2 caplets every 6 hours; not more than 6 caplets in 24 hours children under 12 years: ask a doctor
